<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">

<head>

  <meta charset="UTF-8">

  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">

  <title>✨ Birthday Surprise for Preeti ✨</title>

  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fredoka:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Caveat:wght@500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <style>

    *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}

    :root{--bg-primary:#0d0628;--bg-secondary:#1a0f3d;--accent-gold:#ffd700;--accent-pink:#ff6b9d;--accent-purple:#a855f7;--accent-cyan:#22d3ee;--text-muted:rgba(255,255,255,0.7)}

    html,body{height:100%;font-family:'Fredoka',sans-serif;background:var(--bg-primary);overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-user-select:none;user-select:none}

    .page{display:none;min-height:100vh;width:100%;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}

    .page.active{display:flex}

    .bg-gradient{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 20%,rgba(168,85,247,0.15) 0%,transparent 50%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%,rgba(255,107,157,0.15) 0%,transparent 50%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%,rgba(34,211,238,0.08) 0%,transparent 70%),linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg-primary) 0%,var(--bg-secondary) 100%);z-index:0}

    .stars-container{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:1}

    .star{position:absolute;background:white;border-radius:50%;animation:twinkle var(--duration,3s) ease-in-out infinite var(--delay,0s)}

    @keyframes twinkle{0%,100%{opacity:0.3;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.2)}}

    .content{position:relative;z-index:10;text-align:center;max-width:500px;width:100%}

    h1,h2{font-family:'Fredoka',sans-serif;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent-gold) 0%,var(--accent-pink) 50%,var(--accent-purple) 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(255,215,0,0.3))}

    h1{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,7vw,3rem)}h2{font-size:clamp(1.5rem,5vw,2.4rem)}

    .subtitle{font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:clamp(1.1rem,4vw,1.5rem);color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:8px}

    .floating-emoji{font-size:3.5rem;animation:float 3s ease-in-out infinite;display:inline-block;filter:drop-shadow(0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3))}

    @keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(-3deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-20px) rotate(3deg)}}

    .code-container{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin:28px 0 14px}

    .code-digit{width:55px;height:65px;font-family:'Fredoka',sans-serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:600;text-align:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-radius:14px;color:white;outline:none;transition:all 0.3s;caret-color:var(--accent-gold)}

    .code-digit:focus{border-color:var(--accent-gold);background:rgba(255,215,0,0.1);box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(255,215,0,0.3);transform:scale(1.05)}

    .code-digit.filled{background:rgba(255,215,0,0.15);border-color:var(--accent-gold)}

    .code-digit.error{animation:shake 0.5s;border-color:#ef4444;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.1)}

    @keyframes shake{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}20%,60%{transform:translateX(-8px)}40%,80%{transform:translateX(8px)}}

    .error-text{color:#f87171;font-size:0.9rem;min-height:24px;margin-bottom:12px}

    .btn{font-family:'Fredoka',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:1rem;padding:14px 40px;border:none;border-radius:50px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s}

    .btn-primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent-gold) 0%,#f59e0b 50%,var(--accent-pink) 100%);color:#1a0f3d;box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(255,215,0,0.4)}

    .btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-3px) scale(1.02);box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(255,215,0,0.5)}

    .btn-secondary{background:transparent;color:var(--text-muted);border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);padding:10px 28px;font-size:0.9rem}

    .btn-secondary:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05)}

    .btn-yes{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4ade80,#22c55e);color:white;box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(74,222,128,0.4);padding:16px 50px;font-size:1.2rem}

    .btn-yes:hover{transform:translateY(-3px) scale(1.05)}

    .btn-no{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f87171,#ef4444);color:white;box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(239,68,68,0.3);padding:16px 50px;font-size:1.2rem;transition:all 0.2s}

    .ready-buttons{display:flex;gap:20px;justify-content:center;margin-top:35px;flex-wrap:wrap;min-height:70px;align-items:center}

    .sassy-message{background:rgba(255,107,157,0.15);border:2px solid var(--accent-pink);border-radius:20px;padding:18px 28px;margin-top:20px;animation:pop-in 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)}

    .sassy-message p{font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:1.5rem;color:var(--accent-pink);margin:0}

    .sassy-emoji{font-size:2.5rem;display:block;margin-bottom:8px;animation:bounce 0.6s infinite}

    @keyframes bounce{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-10px)}}

    .question-emoji{font-size:4rem;animation:wiggle 1s infinite;display:inline-block}

    @keyframes wiggle{0%,100%{transform:rotate(-5deg)}50%{transform:rotate(5deg)}}

    .drumroll{font-size:2.5rem;margin:18px 0;letter-spacing:6px;animation:pulse 0.5s infinite}

    @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.5}}

    .gifts-container{display:flex;gap:15px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;margin:30px 0}

    .gift-box{cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s;animation:gift-float 3s ease-in-out infinite}

    .gift-box:nth-child(2){animation-delay:0.3s}.gift-box:nth-child(3){animation-delay:0.6s}.gift-box:nth-child(4){animation-delay:0.9s}.gift-box:nth-child(5){animation-delay:1.2s}

    @keyframes gift-float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(-2deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-12px) rotate(2deg)}}

    .gift-box:hover{animation:gift-wiggle 0.4s infinite;filter:brightness(1.1)}

    @keyframes gift-wiggle{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0)}25%{transform:rotate(-5deg) scale(1.05)}75%{transform:rotate(5deg) scale(1.05)}}

    .gift-body{width:75px;height:65px;border-radius:12px;position:relative;box-shadow:0 10px 30px var(--shadow-color,rgba(0,0,0,0.3))}

    .gift-ribbon-v{position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:18px;height:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);border-radius:3px}

    .gift-ribbon-h{position:absolute;top:50%;left:0;transform:translateY(-50%);width:100%;height:18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);border-radius:3px}

    .gift-bow{position:absolute;top:-14px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-size:1.5rem}

    .gift-label{font-family:'Fredoka',sans-serif;font-weight:600;color:white;margin-top:8px;font-size:0.75rem}

    .gift-status{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin-top:20px}

    .status-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);transition:all 0.3s}

    .status-dot.opened{background:#4ade80;box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(74,222,128,0.6)}

    .cake-scene{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;gap:25px;flex-wrap:wrap}

    .cake-svg{filter:drop-shadow(0 15px 40px rgba(255,107,157,0.3));animation:cake-appear 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)}

    @keyframes cake-appear{0%{transform:scale(0) rotate(-10deg);opacity:0}60%{transform:scale(1.1) rotate(3deg)}100%{transform:scale(1) rotate(0);opacity:1}}

    .flame{animation:flicker 0.5s infinite alternate;transform-origin:center bottom}

    @keyframes flicker{0%{transform:scaleY(1) scaleX(1);opacity:1}100%{transform:scaleY(1.15) scaleX(0.95);opacity:0.85}}

    .flame.out{display:none}

    .teddy-container{animation:teddy-dance 2s infinite}

    @keyframes teddy-dance{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0) rotate(0)}25%{transform:translateX(12px) rotate(5deg)}75%{transform:translateX(-12px) rotate(-5deg)}}

    .teddy-arm-left{animation:wave-left 2s infinite;transform-origin:18px 25px}

    .teddy-arm-right{animation:wave-right 2s infinite;transform-origin:72px 25px}

    @keyframes wave-left{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0)}50%{transform:rotate(-20deg)}}

    @keyframes wave-right{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0)}50%{transform:rotate(20deg)}}

    .photo-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;max-width:340px;margin:20px auto}

    .photo-card{aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:16px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);transition:all 0.5s}

    .photo-card img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:blur(20px) brightness(0.5);transform:scale(1.1);transition:all 1s}

    .photo-card.revealed img{filter:blur(0) brightness(1);transform:scale(1)}

    .photo-card:hover{transform:scale(1.03);box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(168,85,247,0.4)}

    .photo-card::after{content:'💖';position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font-size:2rem;opacity:1;transition:all 0.5s}

    .photo-card.revealed::after{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(2)}

    .photo-card .photo-label{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:10px;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,0.8));color:white;font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:1.1rem;opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px);transition:all 0.5s}

    .photo-card.revealed .photo-label{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}

    .surprise-content{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.5);transition:all 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)}

    .surprise-content.revealed{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}

    .message-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:20px;padding:25px;max-width:420px;margin:20px auto}

    .message-text{font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:1.35rem;color:white;line-height:1.6}

    .balloon-row{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0}

    .balloon{font-size:2rem;animation:balloon-float 3s infinite}

    @keyframes balloon-float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(-5deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-18px) rotate(5deg)}}

    .confetti-container{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:1000;overflow:hidden}

    .confetti{position:absolute;top:-20px;animation:confetti-fall linear forwards}

    @keyframes confetti-fall{0%{transform:translateY(-100%) rotate(0);opacity:1}100%{transform:translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg);opacity:0}}

    .fireworks-container{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:5}

    .firework-particle{position:absolute;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%}

    .heart-container{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:1001}

    .heart{position:absolute;font-size:1.5rem;animation:heart-rise 3s ease-out forwards}

    @keyframes heart-rise{0%{transform:translateY(0) scale(1);opacity:1}100%{transform:translateY(-200px) scale(0.5);opacity:0}}

    .pop-in{animation:pop-in 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards}

    @keyframes pop-in{0%{transform:scale(0);opacity:0}100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}

    .click-counter{font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--accent-pink);margin-top:14px;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s}

    .click-counter.visible{opacity:1}

    .photo-modal{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.95);z-index:2000;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px}

    .photo-modal.active{display:flex}

    .photo-modal img{max-width:90%;max-height:90%;border-radius:16px;box-shadow:0 0 60px rgba(168,85,247,0.3)}

    .photo-modal-close{position:absolute;top:20px;right:20px;font-size:2rem;color:white;cursor:pointer;width:50px;height:50px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:50%;transition:all 0.3s}

    .photo-modal-close:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);transform:scale(1.1)}

    

    /* Spin Wheel */

    .wheel-container{position:relative;width:280px;height:280px;margin:15px auto}

    .wheel{width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;position:relative;transition:transform 4s cubic-bezier(0.17,0.67,0.12,0.99);box-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(168,85,247,0.5),inset 0 0 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)}

    .wheel-center{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:55px;height:55px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffd700,#f59e0b);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.3rem;box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);z-index:10;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s}

    .wheel-center:hover{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.1)}

    .wheel-pointer{position:absolute;top:-12px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-size:2rem;z-index:20;filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.4))}

    .wheel-result{margin-top:15px;padding:18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:18px;opacity:0;transform:scale(0.8);transition:all 0.5s}

    .wheel-result.show{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}

    .wheel-result-text{font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:1.5rem;color:white}

    .wheel-result-emoji{font-size:2.5rem;display:block;margin-bottom:8px}

    .spin-again{margin-top:12px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;transition:color 0.3s}

    .spin-again:hover{color:white}

    

    /* Drag & Drop Puzzle Styles */

    .puzzle-wrapper{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:20px;margin:15px auto}

    .puzzle-target{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:3px;width:280px;height:280px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.4);border-radius:16px;padding:6px;box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)}

    .puzzle-slot{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border-radius:6px;border:2px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all 0.3s}

    .puzzle-slot.drag-over{border-color:var(--accent-gold);background:rgba(255,215,0,0.1);transform:scale(1.02)}

    .puzzle-slot.filled{border:none;background:transparent}

    .puzzle-pieces{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:center;max-width:320px;min-height:100px;padding:10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2);border-radius:12px}

    .puzzle-piece{width:62px;height:62px;background-size:280px 280px;border-radius:6px;cursor:grab;transition:transform 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s;box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)}

    .puzzle-piece:hover{transform:scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(168,85,247,0.4)}

    .puzzle-piece.dragging{opacity:0.8;cursor:grabbing;transform:scale(1.1);z-index:100}

    .puzzle-piece.placed{cursor:default;box-shadow:none}

    .puzzle-piece.placed:hover{transform:none}

    .puzzle-progress{font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent-gold)}

    .puzzle-complete-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.9);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:16px;animation:pop-in 0.5s;z-index:10}

    .puzzle-complete-overlay.show{display:flex}

    .puzzle-complete-overlay img{width:85%;border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:15px;box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(168,85,247,0.4)}

    .puzzle-complete-overlay p{font-family:'Caveat',cursive;font-size:1.3rem;color:white;padding:0 15px;line-height:1.4}

    .puzzle-container-new{position:relative;width:280px}

    .puzzle-hint{font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:5px}

    .shuffle-btn{margin-top:10px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--accent-cyan);cursor:pointer;transition:color 0.3s}

    .shuffle-btn:hover{color:white}

  </style>

</head>

<body>

  <div class="confetti-container" id="confettiContainer"></div>

  <div class="heart-container" id="heartContainer"></div>

  <div class="photo-modal" id="photoModal" onclick="closeModal()">

    <div class="photo-modal-close">✕</div>

    <img id="modalImg" src="" alt="Photo">

  </div>


  <div id="page1" class="page active">

    <div class="bg-gradient"></div>

    <div class="stars-container" id="stars1"></div>

    <div class="content pop-in">

      <div class="floating-emoji">🎁</div>

      <h1 style="margin-top:14px">You Have a Surprise!</h1>

      <p class="subtitle">Enter the secret code to unlock your gift</p>

      <div class="code-container">

        <input type="text" class="code-digit" maxlength="1" data-index="0" inputmode="numeric" autocomplete="off">

        <input type="text" class="code-digit" maxlength="1" data-index="1" inputmode="numeric" autocomplete="off">

        <input type="text" class="code-digit" maxlength="1" data-index="2" inputmode="numeric" autocomplete="off">

        <input type="text" class="code-digit" maxlength="1" data-index="3" inputmode="numeric" autocomplete="off">

      </div>

      <p class="error-text" id="errorText"></p>

      <button class="btn btn-primary" id="unlockBtn">🔓 Unlock the Magic</button>

    </div>

  </div>


  <div id="pageReady" class="page">

    <div class="bg-gradient"></div>

    <div class="stars-container" id="starsReady"></div>

    <div class="content">

      <div class="question-emoji">🤔</div>

      <h1 style="margin-top:18px">Are You Ready?</h1>

      <p class="subtitle">Something amazing awaits you...</p>

      <p class="drumroll">🥁 🥁 🥁</p>

      <div class="ready-buttons">

        <button class="btn btn-yes" id="btnYes" onclick="sayYes()">✨ YES! ✨</button>

        <button class="btn btn-no" id="btnNo" onclick="sayNo()">😅 No...</button>

      </div>

      <div id="sassyContainer"></div>

      <p class="click-counter" id="clickCounter">No clicks: <span id="noCount">0</span> 🙄</p>

    </div>

  </div>


  <div id="page2" class="page">

    <div class="bg-gradient"></div>

    <div class="stars-container" id="stars2"></div>

    <div class="content">

      <h2>Happy Birthday, Preeti!</h2>

      <p class="subtitle">Pick a gift to open 🎉</p>

      <div class="gifts-container">

        <div class="gift-box" onclick="openGift(1)">

          <div class="gift-body" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff6b6b,#ee5a5a);--shadow-color:rgba(255,107,107,0.4)">

            <div class="gift-ribbon-v"></div><div class="gift-ribbon-h"></div><div class="gift-bow">🎀</div>

          </div>

          <p class="gift-label">Cake 🎂</p>

        </div>

        <div class="gift-box" onclick="openGift(2)">

          <div class="gift-body" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#a855f7,#9333ea);--shadow-color:rgba(168,85,247,0.4)">

            <div class="gift-ribbon-v"></div><div class="gift-ribbon-h"></div><div class="gift-bow">🎀</div>

          </div>

          <p class="gift-label">Photos 📸</p>

        </div>

        <div class="gift-box" onclick="openGift(3)">

          <div class="gift-body" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22d3ee,#06b6d4);--shadow-color:rgba(34,211,238,0.4)">

            <div class="gift-ribbon-v"></div><div class="gift-ribbon-h"></div><div class="gift-bow">🎀</div>

          </div>

          <p class="gift-label">Message 💌</p>

        </div>

        <div class="gift-box" onclick="openGift(4)">

          <div class="gift-body" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f472b6,#ec4899);--shadow-color:rgba(236,72,153,0.4)">

            <div class="gift-ribbon-v"></div><div class="gift-ribbon-h"></div><div class="gift-bow">🎀</div>

          </div>

          <p class="gift-label">Spin 🎡</p>

        </div>

        <div class="gift-box" onclick="openGift(5)">

          <div class="gift-body" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4ade80,#22c55e);--shadow-color:rgba(74,222,128,0.4)">

            <div class="gift-ribbon-v"></div><div class="gift-ribbon-h"></div><div class="gift-bow">🎀</div>

          </div>

          <p class="gift-label">Puzzle 🧩</p>

        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="gift-status">

        <div class="status-dot" data-gift="1"></div>

        <div class="status-dot" data-gift="2"></div>

        <div class="status-dot" data-gift="3"></div>

        <div class="status-dot" data-gift="4"></div>

  <div id="page5" class="page">

    <div class="bg-gradient" style="background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 20%,rgba(34,211,238,0.15) 0%,transparent 50%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 80%,rgba(74,222,128,0.15) 0%,transparent 50%),linear-gradient(180deg,#0a1a1a 0%,#0f3b2d 50%,#0a1a1a 100%)"></div>

    <div class="fireworks-container" id="fireworksContainer"></div>

    <div class="content">

      <div class="surprise-content" id="surpriseContent">

        <div style="font-size:3.5rem;margin-bottom:10px">🎊</div>

        <h2 style="font-size:2rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffd700,#22d3ee,#4ade80)">Happy Birthday, Preeti!</h2>

        <div class="message-box">

          <p class="message-text">Aap sach mein sirf amazing nahi hain… aap ek poori duniya hain apne ghar ke liye ❤️<br><br>Papa ke liye sabse bada sahara, Mummy ki asli himmat, aur apne siblings ki woh backbone jiske bina sab adhoora lagta hai.<br><br>Kabhi kabhi shayad aapko khud bhi nahi pata hota ki aap kitni strong hain… par sach ye hai ki aap jaisi koi nahi hai. Aap sirf sabko sambhalti nahi, unke liye ek safe place hain… ek ghar hain. 💛</p>

        </div>

        <div class="balloon-row">

          <span class="balloon">🎈</span><span class="balloon" style="animation-delay:0.2s">🎈</span><span class="balloon" style="animation-delay:0.4s">🎈</span><span class="balloon" style="animation-delay:0.6s">🎈</span><span class="balloon" style="animation-delay:0.8s">🎈</span>

        </div>

      </div>

      <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="goBack()" style="margin-top:18px">← Back to Gifts</button>

    </div>

  </div>

  <div id="page6" class="page">

    <div class="bg-gradient" style="background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 30%,rgba(236,72,153,0.2) 0%,transparent 50%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 70%,rgba(168,85,247,0.15) 0%,transparent 50%),linear-gradient(180deg,#1a0a1a 0%,#2d1045 50%,#1a0a1a 100%)"></div>

    <div class="content">

      <h2 style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f472b6,#a855f7)">🎡 Spin Karo!</h2>

      <p class="subtitle">Dekho aapka luck kya kehta hai!</p>

WBgjAK6GfqGqYPhcfHHiFnzBrENE+pB3LHjkshUQo6t+8sSKZOvqMi4HoR2QXKYZSiGFl/1CnwxUxYcWQ7Ylb15YpkobvcpfvYPMyFRx2RO8QsK/UEDo5TmXNaMS61D5rP3BHiBT7EOpTW+ggtAxno5Qvz6Q9dcf8LENnRWc+EZ3eTiYJEucwyix5hYCko1gVeLl7KUUFYajSNcCQrm/KZLZi7DuJVwGdFhoKLsWXstYEZZhtTydJn8V0GWUCFO0uFHQuza+pcbu0w+Uv3QIuCGbd+dhLebCkqiYUn+yoRrwq5hSAHJwQ+KXS8MJAu4Fy/cB7WzTURT5ZmY1rDFAW7g8QSyapdxKUIc5iKWDHMwGLluGsYYtCJV8/GYmt5i20twktkoeSIhp/Hw4rIA7uMawazPwi1HPEFZca8S/gcRzIPbEpHVVpFt8bKH1Mxc3BFKQzUpbzLUPgY7ZWuXIX+JtJCv6ZixeStTAVCKXHZHZL+N6ii1Saxt7Y1yxsMLUoJiQOO9/cXOmlwfUVZVBuP8AKw+X2zAgYNRUAot3K2OrdsqlgDiUIBejthSHGqCW9wi4lNL+EgmE0vPkwKpxgDLDDvGY9/UBLtASuvgZxNTyhYAtlq9ZxL0Y6hJec7CJjC4DR5iZFyhx7xjLrVf0QeU8x+ED+amjPkyosIsyyykcr5i1XXaYjAGVdxOBlW44VHYglt3GWjepbRYNDzLsDjggYfhhgr43AOYmFQ5YLqipS/uVBJAnXiJeem9MeEoaBoMCwYrw8X3MZTRaHXwq4ZX8eWYflEz6GWHq9EdsCg5pIsom25eybMusMpbHYNUdxW1bNwsNJUWK4iNLRSELV5Rqj3KRqKPJ4uMmlvn+4gUL28iUBSjg2jKlgqZpLHAFCovAKcC2TjEJYrZDDJKAzRSZqVlBe4YJFIFchD+o/wCaiwqInnKDcqWvKkS8nYY1Q+4EGYZZU04h/DV6KbMwHjV5xBNR6cwrrr0n4Zx5+LD3iV11M4cwLzEmvgtEY+zC4sXQxNblR38Ei8zG1x0IFgt9seyQ3mafhpbHKXJziIHbmAABfZWv9QAPEvgRSm5VbjB+KI4AEGOoK1p0fFCVeY+5nKdD0V5jbdyvCuUK8BKccYt+S4YwM9wNbdwx8DiyhMJzLntbojmujiCZgqNdWh/tinEvLB4CLnOroCAVTujLB9K4ILVy7ly4tR1RcVh2G9FcQra7XLKwSWfsMdvD6b1GQPq8uvMf3mKstGByVn3riFmmgoJVHwqMNBx3Boyr7hc1GyMGhUGXuKGlt3HVyqV2osuxGCobCO2sD4V8qt2YS2VlwoLqruXUUjDB7ibGGO5UEdSMLEpBoCyjiU6+BBl3/hZLEJxyu0T7agHPtM84ENJGCDVLL4ZmJbkirOpsDHXqdnI8RDBF1FruJqi2Lz1GqE1Rz1K+QN36lhojkG2WUtwlKjhFqXAzZ0tWvxFJ3tYuvCNyIdPzCGryDUuCNxPpL+CqggglpfaAFodZjkt2qOY2TMIPnTg1ilqKXMdswKSlgLiVUtdxEUBUCsRrPDxHUFew7r4VLFBECq8VLZ6az//+AAMA/9k=';

    let draggedPiece=null;

    

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{createStars('stars1',50);createStars('starsReady',50);createStars('stars2',50);setupCodeInputs();initPuzzle()});

    

    function createStars(id,n){const c=document.getElementById(id);if(!c)return;for(let i=0;i<n;i++){const s=document.createElement('div');s.className='star';const sz=Math.random()*3+1;s.style.cssText=`width:${sz}px;height:${sz}px;left:${Math.random()*100}%;top:${Math.random()*100}%;--duration:${Math.random()*3+2}s;--delay:${Math.random()*2}s`;c.appendChild(s)}}

    

    function setupCodeInputs(){const inputs=document.querySelectorAll('.code-digit');inputs.forEach((inp,i)=>{inp.addEventListener('input',e=>{if(e.target.value){inp.classList.add('filled');if(i<inputs.length-1)inputs[i+1].focus()}else inp.classList.remove('filled');document.getElementById('errorText').textContent='';inputs.forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('error'));checkCode()});inp.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Backspace'&&!inp.value&&i>0)inputs[i-1].focus()});inp.addEventListener('paste',e=>{e.preventDefault();const d=e.clipboardData.getData('text').slice(0,4);d.split('').forEach((c,j)=>{if(inputs[j]){inputs[j].value=c;inputs[j].classList.add('filled')}});checkCode()})});inputs[0].focus()}

    

    function checkCode(){const inputs=document.querySelectorAll('.code-digit');const code=Array.from(inputs).map(i=>i.value).join('');if(code.length===4){if(code===config.secretCode){spawnConfetti();spawnHearts();setTimeout(()=>showPage('pageReady'),500)}else{document.getElementById('errorText').textContent='❌ Galat code! Try again...';inputs.forEach(i=>{i.classList.add('error');setTimeout(()=>i.classList.remove('error'),500)})}}}

    

    document.getElementById('unlockBtn').addEventListener('click',checkCode);

    

    function showPage(id){document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active')}

    function goBack(){showPage('page2');updateGiftStatus()}

    

    function sayYes(){spawnConfetti();spawnHearts();const b=document.getElementById('btnYes');b.textContent="🎉 CHALOOOO!!! 🎉";b.style.transform='scale(1.2)';setTimeout(()=>showPage('page2'),800)}

    

    function sayNo(){noClickCount++;document.getElementById('noCount').textContent=noClickCount;document.getElementById('clickCounter').classList.add('visible');const c=document.getElementById('sassyContainer');const r=sassyResponses[Math.min(noClickCount-1,sassyResponses.length-1)];c.innerHTML=`<div class="sassy-message"><span class="sassy-emoji">${r.emoji}</span><p>${r.text}</p></div>`;const yb=document.getElementById('btnYes');yb.style.transform=`scale(${Math.min(1+noClickCount*0.1,1.8)})`;yb.style.zIndex='10';const nb=document.getElementById('btnNo');if(noClickCount>=3){const rx=(Math.random()-0.5)*200,ry=(Math.random()-0.5)*100;nb.style.transform=`translate(${rx}px,${ry}px) scale(${1-noClickCount*0.1})`}if(noClickCount>=5){nb.style.opacity='0.5';nb.textContent='😢 okay...'}if(noClickCount>=7){nb.style.display='none';c.innerHTML='<div class="sassy-message"><span class="sassy-emoji">🎉</span><p>NO button bhaag gaya! Ab YES dabao Preeti! 😂</p></div>'}}

    

    function openGift(n){giftsOpened.add(n);updateGiftStatus();if(n===1){showPage('page3');if(candlesBlown)resetCandles()}else if(n===2){showPage('page4');resetPhotos()}else if(n===3){showPage('page5');triggerSurprise()}else if(n===4){showPage('page6');resetWheel()}else if(n===5){showPage('page7');resetPuzzle()}}

    function updateGiftStatus(){document.querySelectorAll('.status-dot').forEach(d=>{if(giftsOpened.has(parseInt(d.dataset.gift)))d.classList.add('opened')})}

    

    function blowCandles(){document.querySelectorAll('.flame').forEach((f,i)=>setTimeout(()=>f.classList.add('out'),i*200));candlesBlown=true;document.getElementById('blowBtn').textContent='🎉 Wish Done!';document.getElementById('blowBtn').disabled=true;document.getElementById('blowBtn').style.opacity='0.6';document.getElementById('cakeMessage').textContent='Aapki saari wishes poori hon! ✨';spawnConfetti();spawnHearts()}

    function resetCandles(){document.querySelectorAll('.flame').forEach(f=>f.classList.remove('out'));document.getElementById('blowBtn').textContent='🌬️ Blow Candles';document.getElementById('blowBtn').disabled=false;document.getElementById('blowBtn').style.opacity='1';document.getElementById('cakeMessage').textContent='Blow out the candles!';candlesBlown=false}

    

    function revealPhoto(card,i){if(!card.classList.contains('revealed')){card.classList.add('revealed');photosRevealed.add(i);spawnHearts();if(photosRevealed.size===4){spawnConfetti();document.getElementById('revealAllBtn').style.display='none'}}else{document.getElementById('modalImg').src=card.querySelector('img').src;document.getElementById('photoModal').classList.add('active')}}

    function closeModal(){document.getElementById('photoModal').classList.remove('active')}

    function revealAllPhotos(){document.querySelectorAll('.photo-card').forEach((c,i)=>setTimeout(()=>{c.classList.add('revealed');photosRevealed.add(i)},i*300));setTimeout(()=>{spawnConfetti();document.getElementById('revealAllBtn').style.display='none'},1200)}

    function resetPhotos(){document.querySelectorAll('.photo-card').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('revealed'));photosRevealed.clear();document.getElementById('revealAllBtn').style.display=''}

    

    function triggerSurprise(){setTimeout(()=>{document.getElementById('surpriseContent').classList.add('revealed');spawnConfetti();launchFireworks()},300)}

    function launchFireworks(){const c=document.getElementById('fireworksContainer');c.innerHTML='';const colors=['#ffd700','#ff6b9d','#a855f7','#22d3ee','#4ade80','#f472b6'];for(let f=0;f<6;f++){setTimeout(()=>{const cx=Math.random()*70+15,cy=Math.random()*40+10;for(let i=0;i<16;i++){const p=document.createElement('div');p.className='firework-particle';const a=(i/16)*Math.PI*2,d=Math.random()*100+50,dx=Math.cos(a)*d,dy=Math.sin(a)*d,col=colors[Math.floor(Math.random()*colors.length)];p.style.cssText=`left:${cx}%;top:${cy}%;background:${col};box-shadow:0 0 10px ${col}`;p.animate([{transform:'translate(0,0) scale(1)',opacity:1},{transform:`translate(${dx}px,${dy}px) scale(0)`,opacity:0}],{duration:1200+Math.random()*400,easing:'ease-out',fill:'forwards'});c.appendChild(p);setTimeout(()=>p.remove(),2000)}},f*500)}}

    

    // Spin Wheel

    function spinWheel(){if(isSpinning)return;isSpinning=true;document.getElementById('wheelResult').classList.remove('show');const wheel=document.getElementById('wheel');const prizeIndex=Math.floor(Math.random()*8);const segmentAngle=45;const extraSpins=5;const targetAngle=extraSpins*360+(360-prizeIndex*segmentAngle-segmentAngle/2+270);wheel.style.transform=`rotate(${targetAngle}deg)`;setTimeout(()=>{const prize=wheelPrizes[prizeIndex];document.getElementById('resultEmoji').textContent=prize.emoji;document.getElementById('resultText').textContent=prize.text;document.getElementById('wheelResult').classList.add('show');spawnConfetti();spawnHearts();isSpinning=false},4200)}

    function resetWheel(){document.getElementById('wheelResult').classList.remove('show');document.getElementById('wheel').style.transition='none';document.getElementById('wheel').style.transform='rotate(0deg)';setTimeout(()=>{document.getElementById('wheel').style.transition='transform 4s cubic-bezier(0.17,0.67,0.12,0.99)'},100)}

    

    // Drag & Drop Puzzle

    function initPuzzle(){

      const target=document.getElementById('puzzleTarget');

      const piecesContainer=document.getElementById('puzzlePieces');

      target.innerHTML='';

      piecesContainer.innerHTML='';

      

      // Create 16 slots in target grid

      for(let i=0;i<16;i++){

        const slot=document.createElement('div');

        slot.className='puzzle-slot';

        slot.dataset.index=i;

        slot.addEventListener('dragover',handleDragOver);

        slot.addEventListener('dragleave',handleDragLeave);

        slot.addEventListener('drop',handleDrop);

        target.appendChild(slot);

      }

      

      // Create shuffled pieces

      const indices=[...Array(16).keys()];

      shuffleArray(indices);

      

      indices.forEach(idx=>{

        const piece=document.createElement('div');

        piece.className='puzzle-piece';

        piece.draggable=true;

        piece.dataset.correctIndex=idx;

        const row=Math.floor(idx/4),col=idx%4;

        piece.style.backgroundImage=`url(${puzzleImage})`;

        piece.style.backgroundPosition=`${-col*62}px ${-row*62}px`;

        piece.addEventListener('dragstart',handleDragStart);

        piece.addEventListener('dragend',handleDragEnd);

        // Touch events for mobile

        piece.addEventListener('touchstart',handleTouchStart,{passive:false});

        piece.addEventListener('touchmove',handleTouchMove,{passive:false});

        piece.addEventListener('touchend',handleTouchEnd);

        piecesContainer.appendChild(piece);

      });

      

      placedPieces=0;

      document.getElementById('placedCount').textContent='0';

      document.getElementById('puzzleComplete').classList.remove('show');

    }

    

    function shuffleArray(arr){for(let i=arr.length-1;i>0;i--){const j=Math.floor(Math.random()*(i+1));[arr[i],arr[j]]=[arr[j],arr[i]]}}

    

    function handleDragStart(e){

      draggedPiece=e.target;

      e.target.classList.add('dragging');

      e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move';

    }

    

    function handleDragEnd(e){

      e.target.classList.remove('dragging');

      document.querySelectorAll('.puzzle-slot').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('drag-over'));

    }

    

    function handleDragOver(e){

      e.preventDefault();

      if(!e.target.classList.contains('filled')){

        e.target.classList.add('drag-over');

      }

    }

    

    function handleDragLeave(e){

      e.target.classList.remove('drag-over');

    }

    

    function handleDrop(e){

      e.preventDefault();

      const slot=e.target;

      slot.classList.remove('drag-over');

      

      if(slot.classList.contains('filled')||!draggedPiece)return;

      

      const correctIdx=parseInt(draggedPiece.dataset.correctIndex);

      const slotIdx=parseInt(slot.dataset.index);

      

      if(correctIdx===slotIdx){

        // Correct placement!

        const clone=draggedPiece.cloneNode(true);

        clone.classList.add('placed');

        clone.classList.remove('dragging');

        clone.draggable=false;

        clone.style.width='100%';

        clone.style.height='100%';

        clone.style.backgroundSize='268px 268px';

        const row=Math.floor(correctIdx/4),col=correctIdx%4;

        clone.style.backgroundPosition=`${-col*67}px ${-row*67}px`;

        slot.appendChild(clone);

        slot.classList.add('filled');

        draggedPiece.remove();

        placedPieces++;

        document.getElementById('placedCount').textContent=placedPieces;

        spawnHearts();

        

        if(placedPieces===16){

          setTimeout(()=>{

            document.getElementById('puzzleComplete').classList.add('show');

            spawnConfetti();

          },500);

        }

      }

      draggedPiece=null;

    }

    

    // Touch support for mobile

    let touchPiece=null,touchClone=null,touchStartX,touchStartY;

    

    function handleTouchStart(e){

      e.preventDefault();

      touchPiece=e.target;

      const touch=e.touches[0];

      touchStartX=touch.clientX;

      touchStartY=touch.clientY;

      

      touchClone=touchPiece.cloneNode(true);

      touchClone.style.position='fixed';

      touchClone.style.zIndex='1000';

      touchClone.style.pointerEvents='none';

      touchClone.style.opacity='0.9';

      touchClone.style.transform='scale(1.1)';

      touchClone.style.left=(touch.clientX-31)+'px';

      touchClone.style.top=(touch.clientY-31)+'px';

      document.body.appendChild(touchClone);

      touchPiece.style.opacity='0.3';

    }

    

    function handleTouchMove(e){

      if(!touchClone)return;

      e.preventDefault();

      const touch=e.touches[0];

      touchClone.style.left=(touch.clientX-31)+'px';

      touchClone.style.top=(touch.clientY-31)+'px';

      

      document.querySelectorAll('.puzzle-slot').forEach(s=>{

        const rect=s.getBoundingClientRect();

        if(touch.clientX>=rect.left&&touch.clientX<=rect.right&&touch.clientY>=rect.top&&touch.clientY<=rect.bottom){

          if(!s.classList.contains('filled'))s.classList.add('drag-over');

        }else{

          s.classList.remove('drag-over');

        }

      });

    }

    

    function handleTouchEnd(e){

      if(!touchClone||!touchPiece)return;

      touchClone.remove();

      touchPiece.style.opacity='1';

      

      const touch=e.changedTouches[0];

      const slots=document.querySelectorAll('.puzzle-slot');

      let dropped=false;

      

      slots.forEach(slot=>{

        slot.classList.remove('drag-over');

        const rect=slot.getBoundingClientRect();

        if(touch.clientX>=rect.left&&touch.clientX<=rect.right&&touch.clientY>=rect.top&&touch.clientY<=rect.bottom){

          if(!slot.classList.contains('filled')){

            const correctIdx=parseInt(touchPiece.dataset.correctIndex);

            const slotIdx=parseInt(slot.dataset.index);

            

            if(correctIdx===slotIdx){

              const clone=touchPiece.cloneNode(true);

              clone.classList.add('placed');

              clone.draggable=false;

              clone.style.width='100%';

              clone.style.height='100%';

              clone.style.backgroundSize='268px 268px';

              const row=Math.floor(correctIdx/4),col=correctIdx%4;

              clone.style.backgroundPosition=`${-col*67}px ${-row*67}px`;

              slot.appendChild(clone);

              slot.classList.add('filled');

              touchPiece.remove();

              placedPieces++;

              document.getElementById('placedCount').textContent=placedPieces;

              spawnHearts();

              dropped=true;

              

              if(placedPieces===16){

                setTimeout(()=>{

                  document.getElementById('puzzleComplete').classList.add('show');

                  spawnConfetti();

                },500);

              }

            }

          }

        }

      });

      

      touchClone=null;

      touchPiece=null;

    }

    

    function resetPuzzle(){initPuzzle()}

    

    function spawnConfetti(){const c=document.getElementById('confettiContainer');const colors=['#ffd700','#ff6b9d','#a855f7','#22d3ee','#4ade80','#f472b6','#fb923c'];for(let i=0;i<80;i++){const p=document.createElement('div');p.className='confetti';const sz=Math.random()*10+6;p.style.cssText=`left:${Math.random()*100}%;width:${sz}px;height:${sz}px;background:${colors[Math.floor(Math.random()*colors.length)]};border-radius:${Math.random()>0.5?'2px':'50%'};animation-duration:${Math.random()*2+2}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()}s`;c.appendChild(p);setTimeout(()=>p.remove(),5000)}}

    function spawnHearts(){const c=document.getElementById('heartContainer');const h=['💖','💕','💗','💝','❤️'];for(let i=0;i<15;i++){setTimeout(()=>{const e=document.createElement('div');e.className='heart';e.textContent=h[Math.floor(Math.random()*h.length)];e.style.cssText=`left:${Math.random()*100}%;bottom:${Math.random()*30}%;font-size:${Math.random()*1.5+1}rem`;c.appendChild(e);setTimeout(()=>e.remove(),3000)},i*150)}}

    

    document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape')closeModal()});

  </script>

</body>

</html>
